summary: On September 13, 2024, there was a statistically anomalous spike in adverse event reports for sertraline, with 61 reports received compared to an expected 31.33 based on Holt-Winters forecasting.
notable_pattern: Reports from September 10, 2024, show a mix of severe and non-serious events, including death, hospitalization, and non-serious issues such as alopecia and hidradenitis, with multiple medications co-administered with sertraline.
confidence_caveat: This signal is based on a limited sample of 8 reports and should be further investigated before any conclusions can be drawn.
